name: Dub-It
description: Reference / scaffolding plugin: shows the pluggable extract → transcribe → translate → TTS → mux pattern with stub backends, gated by SDK source_review (D2.3). For production end-to-end dubbing use the video-translator plugin (which wires contrib.asr + contrib.tts).

description_i18n.zh: 教学/脚手架插件：演示 抽音 → 转写 → 翻译 → TTS → 混音 的可插拔流水线（含 SDK source_review D2.3 体检），默认走 stub 后端。生产级的端到端配音翻译请使用 video-translator 插件（已接入 contrib.asr / contrib.tts）。
description_i18n.en: Reference / scaffolding plugin: shows the pluggable extract → transcribe → translate → TTS → mux pattern with stub backends, gated by SDK source_review (D2.3). For production end-to-end dubbing use the video-translator plugin (which wires contrib.asr + contrib.tts).

author: OpenAkita
